title: Grilled Bamboo Shoot Skewers with Egyptian Garlic
description: A delicious and easy-to-make appetizer or snack that combines the flavors of Egypt with the crunch of bamboo shoots.

ingredients.name: Bamboo shoots
ingredients.notes: Canned or fresh, sliced into 1-inch pieces

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for at least 30 minutes

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together garlicky sauce, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add sliced bamboo shoots to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
4. Thread bamboo shoots onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush skewers with crunchy peanut oil.
6. Grill skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until bamboo shoots are tender and slightly charred.
